note: Per-stage, never blended (NFR-3). retrieve/rerank are local; generate is Gemini free-tier measured with retries OFF (throttled calls are skipped, not backoff-inflated). Measured on the platform/device above.
generate_note: generate: n=6 clean single-call, un-throttled answer-generation latencies (Day 5-6 live smokes + Day 7). Free-tier throttling can inflate tail latency to minutes via the google-genai SDK's transport-level retries; those calls are a free-tier artifact and are excluded, not a property of the system.
